column2: When replacing a laser printer toner cartridge that includes an OPC drum, what handling caution matters?
column4: Protect the drum from light until installation and remove any packing strips before using the new cartridge or drum assembly.
column5:
Why

Some toner assemblies include the organic photoconductor drum. The drum is light-sensitive, and shipping materials must be removed before printing.
column9: Professor Messer 220-1201 v1.70 p.43; CompTIA 220-1201 Exam Objectives v4.0, Objective 3.8
column10: A+::220-1201::3.8 A+::220-1201::Domain3-Hardware A+::220-1201::PrinterMaintenance Basic Printer Laser Toner Source::Messer-v170

column2: What is the purpose of a laser printer maintenance kit?
column4: It replaces wear items such as feed rollers and the fuser unit according to the printer's maintenance schedule or page counter.
column5:
Why

Laser printers use heat, pressure, and moving parts. Maintenance kits address predictable wear instead of waiting for the printer to fail.
column9: Professor Messer 220-1201 v1.70 p.43; CompTIA 220-1201 Exam Objectives v4.0, Objective 3.8
column10: A+::220-1201::3.8 A+::220-1201::Domain3-Hardware A+::220-1201::PrinterMaintenance Basic HighYield Printer Laser MaintenanceKit Source::Messer-v170

column2: What safety step matters before replacing a laser printer fuser as part of maintenance?
column4: Power down the printer and let the fuser cool before handling it.
column5:
Why

The fuser uses heat and pressure to bond toner to paper. It can be hot enough to injure a technician during maintenance.
column9: Professor Messer 220-1201 v1.70 p.43; CompTIA 220-1201 Exam Objectives v4.0, Objective 3.8
column10: A+::220-1201::3.8 A+::220-1201::Domain3-Hardware A+::220-1201::PrinterMaintenance Basic HighYield Printer Laser Safety Source::Messer-v170

column2: Why calibrate a laser printer after toner-related maintenance?
column4: Calibration can adjust print density so output is not too dark or too light after cartridge changes.
column5:
Distinction

Calibration is not the same as cleaning. Calibration adjusts output density; cleaning removes toner dust and paper dust.
column9: Professor Messer 220-1201 v1.70 p.43; CompTIA 220-1201 Exam Objectives v4.0, Objective 3.8
column10: A+::220-1201::3.8 A+::220-1201::Domain3-Hardware A+::220-1201::PrinterMaintenance Basic Printer Laser Calibration Source::Messer-v170

column2: When cleaning toner and paper dust from inside a laser printer, what should a technician avoid?
column4: Avoid harsh chemicals, normal household vacuums, and compressed air unless the printer documentation specifically supports that method.
column5:
Why

Laser printers collect toner and paper dust. The source-supported maintenance approach is controlled cleaning, such as wiping dust away and using approved cleaners where appropriate.
column9: Professor Messer 220-1201 v1.70 p.43; CompTIA 220-1201 Exam Objectives v4.0, Objective 3.8
column10: A+::220-1201::3.8 A+::220-1201::Domain3-Hardware A+::220-1201::PrinterMaintenance Basic HighYield Printer Laser Cleaning Source::Messer-v170

column2: What consumable is normally replaced when an inkjet printer runs out of ink?
column4: Replace the ink cartridge or cartridges.
column5:
Why

Inkjet printers place small drops of ink onto the page from cartridges. Cartridges are often separate by color, though some models combine colors.
column9: Professor Messer 220-1201 v1.70 p.44; CompTIA 220-1201 Exam Objectives v4.0, Objective 3.8
column10: A+::220-1201::3.8 A+::220-1201::Domain3-Hardware A+::220-1201::PrinterMaintenance Basic Printer Inkjet Cartridge Source::Messer-v170

column2: Why can replacing an inkjet cartridge sometimes also replace the printhead?
column4: Some inkjet printers integrate the printhead into the cartridge, so a new cartridge includes a new printhead.
column5:
Distinction

Other inkjet printers keep the printhead separate from the cartridge. Check the printer model before assuming the printhead and cartridge are one part.
column9: Professor Messer 220-1201 v1.70 p.44; CompTIA 220-1201 Exam Objectives v4.0, Objective 3.8
column10: A+::220-1201::3.8 A+::220-1201::Domain3-Hardware A+::220-1201::PrinterMaintenance Basic Printer Inkjet Printhead Source::Messer-v170

column2: An inkjet printout has streaks or missing sections of color. Which maintenance action is appropriate?
column3: Think about the small openings that place ink onto the page.
column4: Clean the printhead using the printer's supported automatic or manual cleaning process.
column5:
Why

Inkjet printheads use small holes that can clog. Cleaning printheads is the objective-scoped maintenance task for streaks or missing color sections.
column9: Professor Messer 220-1201 v1.70 p.44; CompTIA 220-1201 Exam Objectives v4.0, Objective 3.8
column10: A+::220-1201::3.8 A+::220-1201::Domain3-Hardware A+::220-1201::PrinterMaintenance Basic HighYield Printer Inkjet Printhead Cleaning Source::Messer-v170

column2: What does inkjet printer calibration align?
column4: It aligns the nozzles to the paper so lines are crisp and colors do not overlap.
column5:
Distinction

Calibration adjusts alignment. It is separate from replacing cartridges or cleaning clogged printheads.
column9: Professor Messer 220-1201 v1.70 p.44; CompTIA 220-1201 Exam Objectives v4.0, Objective 3.8
column10: A+::220-1201::3.8 A+::220-1201::Domain3-Hardware A+::220-1201::PrinterMaintenance Basic Printer Inkjet Calibration Source::Messer-v170

column2: When clearing an inkjet paper jam, what should a technician do after removing the main jammed sheet?
column4: Check the paper path for loose paper or scraps and remove all remaining pieces.
column5:
Why

Inkjet paper paths can have turns and twists. Small scraps left behind can cause another jam.
column9: Professor Messer 220-1201 v1.70 p.44; CompTIA 220-1201 Exam Objectives v4.0, Objective 3.8
column10: A+::220-1201::3.8 A+::220-1201::Domain3-Hardware A+::220-1201::PrinterMaintenance Basic HighYield Printer Inkjet Jam Source::Messer-v170

column2: What role do inkjet feed rollers play?
column4: They pick up and feed paper through the printer.
column5:
Why

The rollers and feeder must be clean and not worn so paper moves through the printer correctly.
column9: Professor Messer 220-1201 v1.70 p.44; CompTIA 220-1201 Exam Objectives v4.0, Objective 3.8
column10: A+::220-1201::3.8 A+::220-1201::Domain3-Hardware A+::220-1201::PrinterMaintenance Basic Printer Inkjet Rollers Source::Messer-v170

column2: Why does a thermal printer require special thermal paper?
column4: Thermal paper is chemically coated to change color when heated by the printer's heating element.
column5:
Distinction

Thermal printers do not use ink or toner. Ordinary paper will not produce the intended output.
column9: Professor Messer 220-1201 v1.70 p.44; CompTIA 220-1201 Exam Objectives v4.0, Objective 3.8
column10: A+::220-1201::3.8 A+::220-1201::Domain3-Hardware A+::220-1201::PrinterMaintenance Basic HighYield Printer Thermal Paper Source::Messer-v170

column2: What is the feed assembly's role in a thermal printer?
column4: It pulls paper through the printer's relatively small paper path.
column5:
Why

Thermal printers commonly have small paper paths. Feed problems are handled by keeping the path and feed mechanism clear.
column9: Professor Messer 220-1201 v1.70 p.44; CompTIA 220-1201 Exam Objectives v4.0, Objective 3.8
column10: A+::220-1201::3.8 A+::220-1201::Domain3-Hardware A+::220-1201::PrinterMaintenance Basic Printer Thermal FeedAssembly Source::Messer-v170

column2: Why should a technician track the correct thermal paper size and type for each printer?
column4: Thermal paper is difficult to substitute, comes in different sizes, and must match the printer.
column5:
Why

Thermal printer paper is not interchangeable with ordinary laser or inkjet paper. The paper is part of the printing process.
column9: Professor Messer 220-1201 v1.70 p.45; CompTIA 220-1201 Exam Objectives v4.0, Objective 3.8
column10: A+::220-1201::3.8 A+::220-1201::Domain3-Hardware A+::220-1201::PrinterMaintenance Basic Printer Thermal Paper Source::Messer-v170

column2: What should be cleaned when a thermal printer needs print-quality maintenance?
column4: Clean the heating element using manufacturer-recommended methods such as isopropyl alcohol, a cleaning pen, or a cleaning card.
column5:
Why

The heating element creates the output on thermal paper. Cleaning methods should be gentle and documentation-supported.
column9: Professor Messer 220-1201 v1.70 p.45; CompTIA 220-1201 Exam Objectives v4.0, Objective 3.8
column10: A+::220-1201::3.8 A+::220-1201::Domain3-Hardware A+::220-1201::PrinterMaintenance Basic HighYield Printer Thermal Cleaning Source::Messer-v170

column2: When removing debris from a thermal printer, what vacuum caution applies?
column4: Avoid using a vacuum unless it is designed for computer-safe use.
column5:
Why

Thermal printers usually have paper bits and dust rather than toner. A computer-safe vacuum resists static buildup and discharge.
column9: Professor Messer 220-1201 v1.70 p.45; CompTIA 220-1201 Exam Objectives v4.0, Objective 3.8
column10: A+::220-1201::3.8 A+::220-1201::Domain3-Hardware A+::220-1201::PrinterMaintenance Basic Printer Thermal Cleaning Source::Messer-v170

column2: When should an impact printer ribbon be replaced?
column4: Replace the ribbon when the ink is consumed and output becomes too light.
column5:
Why

The impact printhead strikes the ribbon against paper. A depleted ribbon produces faint output even if the printhead still moves correctly.
column9: Professor Messer 220-1201 v1.70 p.45; CompTIA 220-1201 Exam Objectives v4.0, Objective 3.8
column10: A+::220-1201::3.8 A+::220-1201::Domain3-Hardware A+::220-1201::PrinterMaintenance Basic HighYield Printer Impact Ribbon Source::Messer-v170

column2: Why is an impact printer printhead a wear item?
column4: It repeatedly strikes the ribbon and paper, takes physical abuse, and can become hot during use.
column5:
Maintenance Note

When replacing an impact printhead, follow the release mechanism and safety guidance for the specific printer.
column9: Professor Messer 220-1201 v1.70 p.45; CompTIA 220-1201 Exam Objectives v4.0, Objective 3.8
column10: A+::220-1201::3.8 A+::220-1201::Domain3-Hardware A+::220-1201::PrinterMaintenance Basic Printer Impact Printhead Source::Messer-v170

column2: What matters most when replacing tractor-feed paper in an impact printer?
column4: Align the paper holes with the tractor feed and position forms so text lands in the predefined spaces.
column5:
Why

Impact printer paper must feed without constraint. Poor alignment can shift form output or stop paper movement.
column9: Professor Messer 220-1201 v1.70 p.45; CompTIA 220-1201 Exam Objectives v4.0, Objective 3.8
column10: A+::220-1201::3.8 A+::220-1201::Domain3-Hardware A+::220-1201::PrinterMaintenance Basic HighYield Printer Impact TractorFeed Source::Messer-v170
